calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Release Of Property From Lien Cal Civil Code Section 8480
Off Calendar Jan-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:(Court call)
Michael Heath, 415.931.4207 for Plaintiff Emily Kwan.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER EMILY KWAN'S Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Release Of Property From Lien Cal Civil Code Section 8480 is Petition to Release Property from Mechanic's Lien is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
